The Constellation

Meet the
Members

01 / MJ

Eldest Member · Main Vocalist

MJ

Kim Myung-jun

"The Happy Virus with a Voice of Gold."

As the eldest member and main vocalist of ASTRO, MJ is the heartbeat of the group. While famously known for his infectious, high-energy personality and his ability to light up any room, don't let his playful spirit fool you — when the music starts, he is a master of his craft.

With a range that effortlessly shifts from bright, soaring melodies to deep, soulful ballads, MJ's voice is the foundation of ASTRO's signature sound. His vocal stability — even while performing the group's most intense choreography — is a testament to his years of dedication. A true artist who refuses to be boxed in, MJ has successfully conquered the worlds of musical theater and trot music.

Vocal PowerhouseHappy Virus Musical TheaterTrot MusicMain Vocalist
02 / JINJIN

Leader · Main Rapper

Jinjin

Park Jin-woo

"The Steady Anchor of ASTRO."

If ASTRO is a constellation, Jinjin is the gravity that holds it together. As the group's leader and main rapper, he has spent the last decade navigating the group through both the brightest peaks and the most challenging valleys — not just a leader by title, but the quiet, protective presence who balances professional excellence with genuine, brotherly care.

Beyond his sharp, husky rap lines and versatile stage presence, Jinjin has evolved into a vital production force through his personal JIN LAB project, contributing as a songwriter, lyricist, and arranger. From street dancing roots to musical theater and radio DJ, he is an all-around artist who never stops pushing his limits.

LeaderJIN LAB SongwriterStreet DancerRadio DJ
03 / CHA EUN-WOO

Member · Actor · Global Icon

Cha Eun-woo

Lee Dong-min

"The Global Icon: Vision, Versatility, and Visionary Growth."

Cha Eun-woo is arguably the most recognizable face of modern Hallyu, but to reduce him to his visuals is to overlook the intense work ethic and artistic evolution that define his career. As a member of ASTRO, he has been the group's steadfast ambassador to the world; as an individual, he has become a force of nature in global entertainment.

His greatest strength is seamlessly balancing two demanding lives — carrying the weight of a globally touring idol and top-tier actor with rare composure. His 2026 Netflix series The Wonderfools and photography exhibition Afterimage highlight a personal, introspective side of his artistry rarely seen by the public. He remains a proud, core member of the ASTRO constellation.

Global Hallyu IconActor The WonderfoolsAfterimageCultural Curator
04 / YOON SAN-HA

Maknae · Vocalist · Solo Artist

Yoon San-ha

Yoon San-ha

"The Maknae's Evolution: From Youthful Charm to Artistic Maturity."

As the youngest member of ASTRO, Yoon San-ha grew up in front of the world's eyes — evolving from the playful, bright-eyed maknae into a formidable solo artist and sophisticated performer. While he will always be the "little brother" of the group, his trajectory over the past decade has proven that he is a powerhouse in his own right.

San-ha has spent his recent years meticulously honing his craft — showcasing musical growth through guitar-driven compositions and his self-directed 2026 mini-album NO REASON. He has a natural way of commanding any audience, whether through the delicate strings of his guitar or a powerful, funk-infused vocal performance. An essential pillar of ASTRO, carrying the group's legacy forward with every note.

VocalistGuitarist NO REASONActorSolo Artist
